title: Peanut butter and chilli fudge – 10 minutes in the microwave

seo.title: Peanut butter and chilli fudge - 10 minutes in the microwave - Marinda Kook

html:
This fudge is really easy and takes 10 minutes to make in the microwave. The microwave stays on 100% – full power – the whole time. The dish you work in must be nice and deep. Make sure it's a dish that's microwave-safe.

  • 1 tin condensed milk
  • 125 g butter
  • 500 ml castor sugar
  • 5 ml vanilla essence
  • 250 ml peanut butter
  • 1 fresh chilli or 15 ml chilli flakes

NOW:

  • melt the butter for 90 seconds in the microwave
  • now set your microwave for 10 minutes – it takes 10 minutes to make the fudge
  • add the condensed milk and castor sugar to the melted butter
  • put the mixture in the microwave and start the 10 minutes
  • now literally every 2 minutes stop the microwave and stir with a wooden spoon (so 5 times)
  • the fudge is now a light caramel colour and starting to thicken
  • stir the vanilla essence in quickly
  • grease a dish of your choice and pour the fudge mixture into the dish – work quickly

TOP LAYER

  • melt a cup of peanut butter together with one finely chopped chilli for 2 minutes in the microwave
  • stir it in well and pour over the fudge
  • after about 5 minutes you can cut the fudge

You can leave out the peanut/chilli layer or replace it with melted chocolate.

It's flop proof, delicious, something different and quick
